name: HonestAlexF LLC
tagline: An AI-augmented solo dev studio. One human, twelve agents, real ship dates.
what: HonestAlexF is the company I run to build software that helps people — using a small army of specialist AI agents instead of a small army of humans. Every project goes through the same pipeline: intake, plan, spec tests, build, verify, review, ship.

services.title: Custom tools & dashboards
services.desc: Internal apps, data pipelines, analytics surfaces.

services.title: AI workflow design
services.desc: Standing up agent teams that fit your existing process.
